title: agoseris aurantiaca subsp. purpurea
intro: Agoseris aurantiaca subsp. purpurea, also known as the purple agoseris, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The purple agoseris has been traditionally used to aid in digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved gut health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
